name: Enduro Metals Corporation
description: Enduro Metals Corporation is a junior copper-gold explorer focused on the Newmont Lake property, a 688 km² land package in British Columbia's Golden Triangle situated between the Eskay Creek, Snip, and Galore Creek deposits. The company is in the exploration stage targeting copper-gold porphyry systems, with recent work identifying a new gold skarn at the October Dome Project expanding a 5.5 km gold-copper target.
